      • getRealmNames

        public Set getRealmNames​(String filter,
                         PolicyModel model)
                  throws AMConsoleException
        Returns a set of realm names.
        Parameters:
        filter - Search Filter.
        model - Policy Model.
        Returns:
        a set of realm names.
        Throws:
        AMConsoleException - if search operation failed.
